snps.effect_template: TCF7L2 — strongest common genetic risk factor for T2D. T allele increases risk ~1.4x per copy.
KCNJ11 E23K variant. Modest effect on insulin secretion and T2D risk.
SLC30A8 variant affecting zinc transporter in pancreatic beta cells.
PPARG Pro12Ala protective variant. G allele (Ala) protective against T2D (OR ~0.86 per copy).
FTO obesity risk variant. A allele increases T2D risk primarily via obesity (OR ~1.15 per copy).
CDKAL1 cyclin-dependent kinase risk variant. C allele increases T2D risk.
HHEX hematopoietically expressed homeobox risk variant. C allele increases T2D susceptibility.
CDKN2A/B cell cycle inhibitor risk variant. T allele associated with increased T2D risk.
IGF2BP2 insulin-like growth factor binding protein risk variant. T allele increases T2D risk.

recommendation_template: Focus on modifiable risk factors: maintain healthy weight, regular exercise, balanced diet. Monitor fasting glucose and HbA1c periodically.

studies.title: Replication of genome-wide association signals in UK samples reveals risk loci for type 2 diabetes
studies.finding: TCF7L2 rs7903146 T allele strongest common T2D risk variant (OR=1.37)

studies.title: Genome-wide association analysis identifies loci for type 2 diabetes and triglyceride levels
studies.finding: Large-scale GWAS identifying multiple T2D susceptibility loci including PPARG, FTO, HHEX, and CDKN2A/B
